name: Grilled Chicken and Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 oz) DOLE Pineapple slices, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken in a shallow non-metallic dish.
2. Add the chicken and turn to coat evenly. Cover; marinate for 15 minutes in the refrigerator.
3. Grill or broil the chicken and pineapple for 10 minutes on each side, or until the chicken is no longer pink.
4. Discard the marinade.
Serves 5.
Source: Dole Pineapple advertisement
